Fetched at: 2026-07-11 06:46 UTC
==========

Here's what happened in crypto today

Robinhood says its AI agent feature will 'soon' be assisting crypto traders
More than 70,000 agentic accounts have already been created by Robinhood equities and options traders since late May.

DOJ moves to dismiss charges against alleged  BitClub fraudster

Kraken to overhaul app with AI investing assistant
The redesigned app will use AI to recommend trades and tailor investing tools around users' financial goals.

Senate Democrats call for hearings into Trump's ties to crypto amid CLARITY Act discussions
Five senators called for committee hearings to investigate US President Donald Trump's policies potentially being influenced by crypto funding.

US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
Donald Trump confirmed he would not sign the bill, setting the stage for it to become law on Saturday.

New Hampshire council votes down  Bitcoin bonds

Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities

Crypto Biz: How stablecoins found their niche

Bitcoin whales sent BTC price to  as Coinbase Premium broke key level: CryptoQuant

A16z's Andreessen lands Federal Reserve role as AI reshapes policy debate
The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead an AI productivity and jobs task force.

MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny

Will the crypto lobby's  campaign get CLARITY over the line?

US charges prisoner over alleged laundering of seized Kraken crypto

Wall Street banks tighten prediction market rules for staff as insider fears spread
Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are restricting employee prediction market trades.

USDC issuer Circle wins final approval for US national trust bank charter
Circle received final OCC approval for a national trust bank.

Japanese lender launches Bitcoin-backed loans of up to .2M

TeraWulf eyes .5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center

Metaplanet explores Bitcoin-backed digital credit with JPYC in Japan

Bitcoin returns to .3K with new 3-week BTC price highs imminent

EU parliament passes 'chat control,' allowing private chat scans until 2028

Robinhood Chain sees over  in ETH bridged during first week

Zcash targets July 28 launch for Ironwood network upgrade

Hackers tried to backdoor Injective NPM package to steal wallet keys

DeFi may be 'quietly re-rating' given outperformance against Bitcoin: Bitwise

Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31

Bitdeer stock jumps 14% as company expands US mining hardware production

White House says it received no Democratic response related to SEC, CFTC vacancies

Phantom, Hyperliquid ask CFTC to modernize rules for onchain derivatives

Bitcoin miners' AI pivot faces investor scrutiny over insider sales
